title: Mproject
description: A massive weapon mod adding legendary swords with unique abilities, new devastating effects, and chaos magic. Created primarily for the residents of the Maluch dormitory.
body:
# MProject v2.9 — Mod Description
**Author:** Mak3785 | **Version:** 2.9 | **Forge 1.20.1**

---

Welcome to **MProject** — a Forge mod that expands Minecraft with a new arsenal of weapons, unique survival mechanics, and chaotic world events.

---

## ⚔️ Weapons

The mod adds **16+ custom swords**, each with its own passive abilities and active skills. A few highlights:

- **Nether Sword** — Fire resistance, pacifies Blazes and Wither Skeletons, shoots a large fireball on right-click.
- **Nether Wither Sword** — Upgrade of the Nether Sword. Adds a Wither Aura that damages all nearby enemies every 2 seconds, shoots a Wither Skull.
- **Blade of Purity** — Passive shield: blocks all negative effects from being applied to you.
- **Blade of Purity Soul Drinker** — Reflects your negative effects onto nearby enemies instead of letting them affect you. Permanently increases your max health on kill.
- **Spring Sword** — Heals and protects during the day; curses you at night. Long-range root ability and instant crop growth.
- **Techno Blade** — Three hotkey abilities: mass debuffs, mass levitation, and a powerful speed burst.
- **Hyperion** — Slows nearby enemies passively; doubles damage against approaching enemies; pulls all enemies inward and explodes on right-click.
- **Scylla** — Deals 1.5× damage when attacking from behind.
- **Valkyrie** — Builds attack speed stacks with each consecutive hit.
- **Legion Commander** — Commands up to 8 legionnaires across 10 progression ranks with formations, special units, and a sacrificial strike ability.

---

## 🛠️ Tools

- **Fire Pickaxe** — Ignites surrounding blocks and mobs when breaking blocks.

---

## 🍎 Special Items

- **Randomsphera** — A chaos artifact. Random outcome every use: could give you a legendary sword or blow you up.
- **Pill of the Deceiver** — Take on another player's appearance. Mobs won't target you while disguised.
- **Diamond Apple** — A powerful consumable with a strong effect bundle.
- **Ender Pouch** — Opens your ender chest from anywhere.
- **Mirror Teleport** — Saves your bed coordinates and teleports you back instantly.

---

## 🧪 Effects & Potions

7 new custom effects, all brewable and available as splash, lingering and arrow variants:

| Effect | What it does |
|--------|--------------|
| **Fragility** | Multiplies all incoming damage |
| **Corrosion** | Rapidly damages and weakens armor |
| **Binding** | Completely locks your inventory and UI |
| **Heavy Heart** | Pulls you toward the ground — jumping becomes nearly impossible |
| **Kickback** | Randomly launches you in unpredictable directions |
| **Paranoid** | Hallucinations, phantom spawns, random screen distortions |
| **Slippery Feet** | You can't stop sliding |

---

## ✨ Enchantments

- **Soulbound** — Item stays with you on death.
- **Greed** — Auto-collects all drops directly into your inventory.
- **Smokescreen** — Arrows create a smoke cloud and hide enemy nametags on hit.
- **Mining 3×3** — Breaks a 3×3 area per swing.
- **Player Tracker** — Compass always points to the nearest player.
- **Doubleshot / Triple Shot** — Fire 2 or 3 arrows at once.

---

## 🌍 World Events

- **Blood Moon** — Hostile mobs spawn stronger and better equipped.
- **Green Moon** — No hostile mobs spawn. A peaceful night.
- **Acid Rain** — Damages players in the open, oxidizes copper, corrodes armor.
- **Chaos Storm** — Lightning strikes, enchantments shuffle randomly, minibosses spawn.

---

## 🏟️ Hunger Games System

Built-in Hunger Games support with a shrinking world border (`/hgbarrier`) and a weighted structure spawning system (`/hgstructure`) for generating full arenas. State persists through server restarts.

---

## 🤖 Iron Golem Upgrades

- Heal them with iron ingots.
- Villages automatically maintain at least 2 golems.
- Golems taunt nearby mobs, redirecting aggro away from villagers.

---

📖 **Full wiki (all items, crafting recipes, commands):**
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lc9BmU_2RtVLV3eJUoMeIBcFXu9A4cn9/view?usp=sharing

---

> ⚠️ **Texture Notice:** Most textures used in this mod were sourced from various authors across the community. All rights to those textures remain with their original owners. The mod author makes no claim of authorship over these assets.
